title: HOUSING ADVOCACY - 211info
text: APPLEGATE LANDING HOUSING ADVOCACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides listings of affordable housing providers and can offer connections to possible housing opportunities. 1875 Stoltz Hill Road Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Households who are at low-to-moderate income standards, survivors of domestic violence, and individuals with severe and persistent mental illnesses. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 405-4210 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 405-4210 Main phone Main phone (541) 405-4210 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: ID recommended LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, Marion, and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LINX Public Transit stop is in front of the complex Services: Housing Search Assistance Housing Search Assistance * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Housing Search Assistance * Domestic Violence Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD AND NUTRITION SUPPORT HOUSING/SHELTER - CROSSROADS CONNECTIONS MEN'S TRANSITIONAL HOUSE INFORMATION SERVICES - INTAKE SERVICES INFORMATION SERVICES - MOBILE SERVICES TRANSPORTATION - CROSSROADS COMMUNITIES TRANSIT VAN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. APPLEGATE LANDING
